model_usage: Default prey energy density for kcal/day->krill kg/day conversion
notes: Derived envelope uses low dry energy with high moisture for min and high dry energy with low moisture for max. 1 kJ/g wet = 1 MJ/kg wet.

context: Turbulent forced convection over a flat plate
model_usage: Supports convection speed exponent choice (h ~ U^0.8 in turbulent regime)
source_citation: Kulacki/Ghajar (Marks Standard Handbook excerpt PDF): Nu = 0.037 Re^0.8 Pr^1/3 for turbulent flat plate
notes: Using Re ~ U*L/nu, Nu ~ Re^0.8 implies h ~ U^0.8 (for fixed fluid properties and geometry). This is an engineering correlation, not a whale-specific measurement.
